title: American-Style Tuna Stir Fry
description: Quick and easy tuna stir fry with a blend of American flavors.

ingredients.name: Optional: Chopped Green Onions for garnish

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned tuna and break it apart with a spoon.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the steamed broccoli and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the broccoli is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
